_comment: (lowercase, no spaces; paths.safe_name strips anything else).
Files starting with underscore are ignored by the picker.
Once the file exists, the guild appears in the profile form's
Guild dropdown. All sections optional; cascade rule is REPLACE
(same key in character file beats this; this beats mud/global).

triggers._cooldown_note: Re-sending 'tactical' while one is still active echoes a status line that re-matches this trigger -> loop. cooldown (secs) blocks the refire. Tune toward the tac-enhance duration if it still misfires; the global flood breaker backstops regardless.
